headline: Pegasystems Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: PEGA's revenues rise 9.4% as cloud sales surge, but earnings miss estimates and delayed AI-era buying decisions slow ACV growth.

raw.headline: Pegasystems Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y

headline: SK Hynix Pares 4% Drop After Denying Talks to Buy Intel’s Ohio Fab as Market Shrugs Off Iran Jitters
summary: A leaked report about SK Hynix eyeing Intel's massive Ohio chip campus sent shares swinging, but a swift denial only tells part of the story behind today's volatile session.

raw.headline: SK Hynix Pares 4% Drop After Denying Talks to Buy Intel’s Ohio Fab as Market Shrugs Off Iran Jitters
raw.summary: A leaked report about SK Hynix eyeing Intel's massive Ohio chip campus sent shares swinging, but a swift denial only tells part of the story behind today's volatile session.

headline: Add These 4 GARP Stocks to Your Portfolio to Receive Handsome Returns
summary: The GARP strategy helps investors gain exposure to stocks that have solid prospects and are trading at a discount. FTNT, TPR, EXPE and RL are some such stocks.

raw.headline: Add These 4 GARP Stocks to Your Portfolio to Receive Handsome Returns
raw.summary: The GARP strategy helps investors gain exposure to stocks that have solid prospects and are trading at a discount. FTNT, TPR, EXPE and RL are some such stocks.

headline: What Cisco Stock Was Telling You About Its AI Orders
summary: You could be forgiven for glancing at Cisco (CSCO)’s financials in early 2025 and promptly falling asleep. As of its fiscal third-quarter report for FY 2025 (July fiscal ending), trailing-twelve-month revenue had grown 0.5%. It was a picture of a mature tech titan, not a rocket ship.
